FAST_HEAT.TITLE: Quick heating
FAST_HEAT.DESCRIPTION:
The Askoma heating rod automatically selects the equivalent heating level.
The maximum power duration is 10 hours.
After that, it makes 1h pause.

SURPLUS.TITLE: PV surplus
SURPLUS.DESCRIPTION: Enables even heating of different buffer tanks. Activation happens automatically, perfectly adapted to your excess and available PV energy.
